title: Logistics and Warehousing Services
entry_mechanism: NIDLP-KAEC automotive cluster development with international partner
executive_summary:
Automotive just-in-time logistics — the sequenced delivery of components to assembly lines, inbound material management, and finished vehicle distribution — requires dedicated automotive logistics capability. Node AU-9 targets Saudi-operated automotive logistics services for the KAEC automotive cluster and Saudi OEM assembly programmes.

The global automotive logistics and warehousing services market is growing in line with the overall automotive industry. Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 automotive programme creates immediate domestic demand anchored by Saudi OEM assembly and the 10M+ vehicle installed base.
